title: olearia telmatica
intro: Olearia telmatica, also known as the Swamp Daisy, is a flowering plant native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Olearia telmatica has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and combat infection. The herbal preparations of Olearia telmatica include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made from the plant's leaves and flowers.
